AR1.justification: Routed a not-yet-a-commitment (no team alignment, no constraint named, no consequences) into decisions.md, violating the methodology's strict bar that a future reader must ask 'are we allowed to do X?' — this belonged in observations.md or daybook Log.

AR2.justification: n/a — this is a routing scenario, not a procedure/runbook execution.

AR3.justification: Used the canonical relative anchor form `decisions.md#2026-05-17-events-service-will-use-postgres` from the daybook Log entry, matching the methodology's cross-reference convention.

AR4.justification: Actions are append-only (new dated entry at the bottom of decisions.md, new daybook file, new Log line) and would not conflict or mutate prior history on re-run.
